changeLog: Pro Maps Update V1.2.0, offline cache (11z-18z) enabled for all maps, Pro Tracker V1.2.0, Incl Cold-Start Anti-Spike filtering for older, newer phones. Critical system hardening deployed. Includes OS-level folder sanitization for failsafe offline AO caching, automated HUD scaling for variable display sizes, and advanced tracker engine optimizations (stationary drift elimination & battery preservation). Tactical Waypoints HUD upgraded with an interactive Target Range metric toggle, alongside a fully wired G-Maps export bridge. The instl will download the app-release file inside the itrl folder. User needs to instl that downloaded app-release apk file from the downloaded itrl folder. As it is a BD local product, user needs to give, auth all the access, permission to instl the new version app-release apk. This will update the present version. 05 Jun 2026.
